    subtitle_srt.write_text("1\n00:00:00,000 --> 00:00:01,000\nhello\n", encoding="utf-8")
    subtitle_ass = task_dir / "total.ass"
    subtitle_ass.write_text("[Script Info]\n", encoding="utf-8")
    script_text = task_dir / "script.txt"
    script_text.write_text("原始识别文本", encoding="utf-8")
    clip_text = task_dir / "clip_text.txt"
    clip_text.write_text("裁剪文本", encoding="utf-8")
    forum_post_info = task_dir / "forum_post_info.json"
    forum_post_info.write_text('{"thread_id":"123"}', encoding="utf-8")
    cover_image = task_dir / "论坛封面标题.png"
    cover_image.write_bytes(b"png")
    logs_dir = task_dir / "logs"
    logs_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    process_log = logs_dir / "funclip_20260326_150000.log"
    process_log.write_text("pipeline ok", encoding="utf-8")
    state_file = task_dir / "state.json"
    state_file.write_text(
        json.dumps(
            {
                "last_completed_step": 9,
                "output_file": str(final_video),
                "step_name": "文件整理",
            },
            ensure_ascii=False,
        ),
        encoding="utf-8",
    )

    task = UnifiedTask(
        task_id="render-manifest-task",
        task_type=TaskType.VIDEO,
        source="unit",
        source_path=str(tmp_path / "source.mp4"),
    )
    Path(str(task.source_path)).write_bytes(b"source-video")

    result = service._attach_video_render_manifest(
        task,
        {
            "success": True,
            "request_type": "video",
            "engine": "internal_pipeline",
            "output_path": str(final_video),
        },
    )

    artifacts = result.get("artifacts") or []
    roles = {str(item.get("role")): item for item in artifacts}
    assert "final_video" in roles
    assert roles["final_video"].get("is_primary") is True
    assert "subtitle_srt" in roles
    assert "subtitle_ass" in roles
    assert "clip_text" in roles
    assert "forum_post_info" in roles
    assert "cover_image" in roles
    assert "processing_log" in roles
    assert "pipeline_state" in roles

    render_manifest = result.get("render_manifest") or {}
    assert render_manifest.get("schema_version") == "1.0"
    assert render_manifest.get("primary_artifact_id") == roles["final_video"].get("artifact_id")
    subtitles = render_manifest.get("subtitles") or {}
    assert subtitles.get("srt") == roles["subtitle_srt"].get("artifact_id")
    assert subtitles.get("ass") == roles["subtitle_ass"].get("artifact_id")
    texts = render_manifest.get("texts") or {}
    assert texts.get("clip_text") == roles["clip_text"].get("artifact_id")
    assert texts.get("script") == roles["transcript_text"].get("artifact_id")
    context = render_manifest.get("context") or {}
    assert context.get("forum_post_info") == roles["forum_post_info"].get("artifact_id")
    cover = render_manifest.get("cover") or {}
    assert cover.get("image") == roles["cover_image"].get("artifact_id")
    logs = render_manifest.get("logs") or {}
    assert logs.get("processing") == roles["processing_log"].get("artifact_id")
    pipeline_state = render_manifest.get("pipeline_state") or {}
    assert pipeline_state.get("last_completed_step") == 9


def test_internal_pipeline_context_keeps_only_forum_snapshot_and_clip_text(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "clonecut_internal_context.db"))
    cfg = _build_config(tmp_path)
    service = WorkerService(cfg)
    task_dir = Path(cfg.output_dir) / "context-task"
    task_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    source = tmp_path / "context-source.mp4"
    source.write_bytes(b"video-content")
    user_clip_text = tmp_path / "user-clip-text.txt"
    user_clip_text.write_text("user clip text", encoding="utf-8")

    task = UnifiedTask(
        task_id="context-task",
        task_type=TaskType.VIDEO,
        source="unit",
        source_path=str(source),
        payload={
            "clip_text_file": str(user_clip_text),
            "stage5_model_name": "yunyi-codex/gpt-5.4",
            "file_encoding": "utf-8",
            "stage5_use_preprocessor": True,
        },
        metadata={
            "source": "unit",
            "forum_post_info": {"thread_id": "123"},
            "openai_backend_model": "legacy-model-id",
        },
    )

    options = service._prepare_internal_pipeline_context(task=task, task_dir=task_dir)

    assert "forum_post_info_json" in options
    assert "clip_text_file" in options
    assert "model" not in options
    assert "openai_backend_model" not in options
    assert "file_encoding" not in options
    assert "stage5_use_preprocessor" not in options
    assert options.get("clip_text_file") == str(task_dir / "clip_text.txt")
    assert (task_dir / "clip_text.txt").read_text(encoding="utf-8") == "user clip text"

    monkeypatch.setattr("apps.worker.service.VideoPipeline", FakeVideoPipeline, raising=False)

        lambda *args, **kwargs: (_ for _ in ()).throw(AssertionError("legacy subprocess path should not run")),

    result = service._run_internal_video_pipeline(task, str(source))

    assert result.get("output_path") == str(expected_output)
    assert result.get("executed_mode") == "video_pipeline"
    executed = result.get("executed_stages") or []
    assert "stage1_transcode" in executed
    assert "stage8_cover" in executed
    assert captured["config_output_dir"] == str(Path(cfg.output_dir))
    assert captured["input_video"] == str(source)
    assert captured["task_id"] == task.task_id
    assert captured["start_from_stage"] == 0
    assert captured["forum_post_info"] == {"thread_id": "123", "title": "topic"}
    assert captured["clip_text"] == "user supplied clip text"
    assert task.current_stage == 11
    assert task.stage_checkpoint == "stage9_organize"
    assert (Path(cfg.output_dir) / task.task_id / "forum_post_info.json").exists()
    assert (Path(cfg.output_dir) / task.task_id / "clip_text.txt").exists()
    state_payload = json.loads((Path(cfg.output_dir) / task.task_id / "state.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    assert state_payload["last_completed_step"] == 9
    assert state_payload["last_completed_step_name"] == "stage9_organize"
    assert state_payload["output_file"] == str(expected_output)


def test_internal_pipeline_real_video_pipeline_preserves_user_clip_text_into_stage6(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "clonecut_internal_real_pipeline.db"))
    cfg = _build_config(tmp_path)
    cfg.raw["worker"]["use_internal_pipeline"] = True
    service = WorkerService(cfg)

    source = tmp_path / "real-pipeline-source.mp4"
    source.write_bytes(b"video-content" * 128)
    task = UnifiedTask(
        task_id="real-pipeline-clip-text-1",
        task_type=TaskType.VIDEO,
        source="unit",
        source_path=str(source),
        payload={"clip_text": "user supplied clip text"},
        metadata={"source": "unit", "forum_post_info": {"thread_id": "123"}},
    )

    final_output = Path(cfg.output_dir) / task.task_id / "final.mp4"

    def passthrough_stage(input_video, output_dir, task_id, *args, **kwargs):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
        _ = output_dir
        _ = task_id
        _ = args
        _ = kwargs
        return StageResult(success=True, output_file=str(input_video))

    def assert_clip_text_stage6(input_video, output_dir, task_id):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
        clip_text_path = Path(output_dir) / task_id / "clip_text.txt"
        assert clip_text_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8") == "user supplied clip text"
        return StageResult(success=True, output_file=str(input_video))

    def finalize_stage9(
        input_video,
        *,
        output_dir,
        task_id,
        keep_intermediate_files=False,
        forum_post_info=None,
        original_filename="",
    ):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]

assistant #141 final_answer 09:33:04

结论：你这个推进顺序是合理的，而且“第 1 项先做真实烟测”是对的。

我刚按当前分支和记忆状态快速核对了下，建议只做一个小收紧：

1. 保持你现在的顺序不变，但把第 1 项验收标准写死
- 必须是 executed_mode=video_pipeline，不能是 fallback_copy。
- 必须同时产出并可下载：主成片、字幕、封面、openclaw_result、render_manifest、state.json。
- openclaw_result.schema_version / render_manifest.schema_version 固定校验。

2. 第 2 项“旧主链退场检查”建议紧跟烟测后立刻做
- 我发现旧链引用仍存在于 [internal_pipeline_runner.py:63](d:/clonecut/apps/worker/internal_pipeline_runner.py:63) 和 [internal_pipeline_runner.py:76](d:/clonecut/apps/worker/internal_pipeline_runner.py:76)。
- 目前主 worker 路径已经是 VideoPipeline（见 [service.py:1345](d:/clonecut/apps/worker/service.py:1345)），但这个旧入口最好明确处置（删除/隔离/标记仅迁移期）。

3. 第 3 项契约回归你其实已经有基础了
- openclaw_result 与 render_manifest 的 schema 断言在 [test_api_task_management.py:191](d:/clonecut/tests/integration/test_api_task_management.py:191)、[test_api_task_management.py:210](d:/clonecut/tests/integration/test_api_task_management.py:210)。
- clip_text / 字幕 / 封面 / artifacts / state.json 相关断言在 [test_worker_service.py:469](d:/clonecut/tests/unit/test_worker_service.py:469) 一段已覆盖到关键字段。

补充状态：MemoryTree 已读取，当前 active todo 里确实把“真实 smoke test”和“旧 pre 主链下线”列为下一批关键待办，与你这次判断一致。
如果你愿意，我下一步就直接按你第 1 项执行一次 D:\clonecut\input\test.mp4 真实烟测并给你产出验收清单。

我刚按当前分支和记忆状态快速核对了下，建议只做一个小收紧：

2. 第 2 项“旧主链退场检查”建议紧跟烟测后立刻做

assistant #163 final_answer 09:36:51

建议用 worktree，尤其你接下来不只做烟测，还要做第 2-4 项改造。

原因很直接：
1. 当前工作区已经是脏的（data/clonecut.db、docs/、.tmp_、Memory/* 都有改动）。
2. 真实烟测会继续产生 output/log/db/tmp 噪音，和后续代码改动混在一起后很难审查。
3. 你们有 Memory 提交边界规则，worktree 更容易保证“产品代码改动”和“记忆文件改动”分离。

如果只跑一次临时烟测、不打算提交，也可以在当前分支直接跑；但从你这个阶段目标看，worktree 是更稳的选择。

Show task summary

建议用 worktree，尤其你接下来不只做烟测，还要做第 2-4 项改造。

原因很直接：
1. 当前工作区已经是脏的（data/clonecut.db、docs/、.tmp_、Memory/* 都有改动）。
2. 真实烟测会继续产生 output/log/db/tmp 噪音，和后续代码改动混在一起后很难审查。
3. 你们有 Memory 提交边界规则，worktree 更容易保证“产品代码改动”和“记忆文件改动”分离。

如果只跑一次临时烟测、不打算提交，也可以在当前分支直接跑；但从你这个阶段目标看，worktree 是更稳的选择。

Output:
---
name: using-git-worktrees
description: Use when starting feature work that needs isolation from current workspace or before executing implementation plans - creates isolated git worktrees with smart directory selection and safety verification
---

# Using Git Worktrees

## Overview

Git worktrees create isolated workspaces sharing the same repository, allowing work on multiple branches simultaneously without switching.

**Core principle:** Systematic directory selection + safety verification = reliable isolation.

**Announce at start:** "I'm using the using-git-worktrees skill to set up an isolated workspace."

## Directory Selection Process

Follow this priority order:

### 1. Check Existing Directories

```bash
# Check in priority order
ls -d .worktrees 2>/dev/null     # Preferred (hidden)
ls -d worktrees 2>/dev/null      # Alternative
```

**If found:** Use that directory. If both exist, `.worktrees` wins.

### 2. Check CLAUDE.md

```bash
grep -i "worktree.*director" CLAUDE.md 2>/dev/null
```

**If preference specified:** Use it without asking.

### 3. Ask User

If no directory exists and no CLAUDE.md preference:

```
No worktree directory found. Where should I create worktrees?

1. .worktrees/ (project-local, hidden)
2. ~/.config/superpowers/worktrees/<project-name>/ (global location)

Which would you prefer?
```

## Safety Verification

### For Project-Local Directories (.worktrees or worktrees)

**MUST verify directory is ignored before creating worktree:**

```bash
# Check if directory is ignored (respects local, global, and system gitignore)
git check-ignore -q .worktrees 2>/dev/null || git check-ignore -q worktrees 2>/dev/null
```

**If NOT ignored:**

Per Jesse's rule "Fix broken things immediately":
1. Add appropriate line to .gitignore
2. Commit the change
3. Proceed with worktree creation

**Why critical:** Prevents accidentally committing worktree contents to repository.

### For Global Directory (~/.config/superpowers/worktrees)

No .gitignore verification needed - outside project entirely.

## Creation Steps

### 1. Detect Project Name

```bash
project=$(basename "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)")
```

### 2. Create Worktree

```bash
# Determine full path
case $LOCATION in
  .worktrees|worktrees)
    path="$LOCATION/$BRANCH_NAME"
    ;;
  ~/.config/superpowers/worktrees/*)
    path="~/.config/superpowers/worktrees/$project/$BRANCH_NAME"
    ;;
esac

# Create worktree with new branch
git worktree add "$path" -b "$BRANCH_NAME"
cd "$path"
```

### 3. Run Project Setup

Auto-detect and run appropriate setup:

```bash
# Node.js
if [ -f package.json ]; then npm install; fi

# Rust
if [ -f Cargo.toml ]; then cargo build; fi

# Python
if [ -f requirements.txt ]; then pip install -r requirements.txt; fi
if [ -f pyproject.toml ]; then poetry install; fi

# Go
if [ -f go.mod ]; then go mod download; fi
```

### 4. Verify Clean Baseline

Run tests to ensure worktree starts clean:

```bash
# Examples - use project-appropriate command
npm test
cargo test
pytest
go test ./...
```

**If tests fail:** Report failures, ask whether to proceed or investigate.

**If tests pass:** Report ready.

### 5. Report Location

```
Worktree ready at <full-path>
Tests passing (<N> tests, 0 failures)
Ready to implement <feature-name>
```

## Quick Reference

| Situation | Action |
|-----------|--------|
| `.worktrees/` exists | Use it (verify ignored) |
| `worktrees/` exists | Use it (verify ignored) |
| Both exist | Use `.worktrees/` |
| Neither exists | Check CLAUDE.md 鈫?Ask user |
| Directory not ignored | Add to .gitignore + commit |
| Tests fail during baseline | Report failures + ask |
| No package.json/Cargo.toml | Skip dependency install |

## Common Mistakes

### Skipping ignore verification

- **Problem:** Worktree contents get tracked, pollute git status
- **Fix:** Always use `git check-ignore` before creating project-local worktree

### Assuming directory location

- **Problem:** Creates inconsistency, violates project conventions
- **Fix:** Follow priority: existing > CLAUDE.md > ask

### Proceeding with failing tests

- **Problem:** Can't distinguish new bugs from pre-existing issues
- **Fix:** Report failures, get explicit permission to proceed

### Hardcoding setup commands

- **Problem:** Breaks on projects using different tools
- **Fix:** Auto-detect from project files (package.json, etc.)

## Example Workflow

```
You: I'm using the using-git-worktrees skill to set up an isolated workspace.

[Check .worktrees/ - exists]
[Verify ignored - git check-ignore confirms .worktrees/ is ignored]
[Create worktree: git worktree add .worktrees/auth -b feature/auth]
[Run npm install]
[Run npm test - 47 passing]

Worktree ready at /Users/jesse/myproject/.worktrees/auth
Tests passing (47 tests, 0 failures)
Ready to implement auth feature
```

## Red Flags

**Never:**
- Create worktree without verifying it's ignored (project-local)
- Skip baseline test verification
- Proceed with failing tests without asking
- Assume directory location when ambiguous
- Skip CLAUDE.md check

**Always:**
- Follow directory priority: existing > CLAUDE.md > ask
- Verify directory is ignored for project-local
- Auto-detect and run project setup
- Verify clean test baseline

## Integration

**Called by:**
- **brainstorming** (Phase 4) - REQUIRED when design is approved and implementation follows
- **subagent-driven-development** - REQUIRED before executing any tasks
- **executing-plans** - REQUIRED before executing any tasks
- Any skill needing isolated workspace

**Pairs with:**
- **finishing-a-development-branch** - REQUIRED for cleanup after work complete

docs\方案B执行待办清单.md:5:在不使用旧架构级兜底方案的前提下，重建 `domain/video/stages/`，让 `domain/video/pipeline.py` 成为 CloneCut 的平台无关唯一生产主链，并把固定冷启动收敛为 worker 启动期的一次性预热成本；OpenClaw 只是第一层 skill 适配，不是唯一宿主。

docs\archive\阶段6-监控报告详细方案.md:356:self.process_worker = ProcessWorker(
docs\archive\项目用途结论.md:6:它的核心目标是把论坛中发现的原始帖子/视频资源，经过自动下载、语音识别、AI 文本裁剪、字幕重建、封面标题生成、成片整理，再由 worker 回传结果并可自动回帖上传附件，形成一条可调度、可监控、可回归验证的闭环生产链路。
docs\archive\项目用途结论.md:16:  - 负责机器健康检查、待分发任务队列、选择空闲 worker、把任务派发出去。
docs\archive\项目用途结论.md:19:- `apps/worker/main.py` 和 `apps/worker/service.py`
docs\archive\项目用途结论.md:20:  - worker 把任务拆成 `download -> process -> upload` 三段。
docs\archive\项目用途结论.md:32:  - 对视频任务，优先把帖子 URL 作为 `source_url` 传给 worker，后续再解析下载真实媒体。
docs\archive\项目用途结论.md:42:- `apps/worker/service.py`
docs\archive\项目用途结论.md:135:它把“论坛发现内容、提取上下文、调度 worker、执行视频智能剪辑流水线、生成字幕与封面、上传产物并回帖”整合成一个完整系统，并辅以 API、监控面板、Gradio 手动台、Redis/SQLite 持久化，以及严格的回归验收脚本。

Output:
# CloneCut

CloneCut 是面向生产的任务处理平台骨架项目，目标是平滑承接现有 FunClip/TTS 生产链路，并支持后续模块化扩展。

## 当前状态

- 已完成目录分层骨架
- 已完成开发基线文档
- 已提供配置模板和启动脚本模板
- 已提供统一任务模型与配置加载基础代码
- 已接入阶段1增量能力：Redis/SQLite（可用即启用，不可用自动回退内存）
- 已接入阶段2增量能力：内置 `VideoPipeline`（stage0~9）与 ASR/剪辑基础实现
- 已提供真实样本回归对比与 B1 门槛判定脚本：`scripts/regression_compare.py`、`scripts/regression_gate.py`
- 已提供 nightly 回归门槛 workflow：`.github/workflows/nightly-regression-gate.yml`
- 已补最终验收闭环脚本：`scripts/forum_e2e_regression.py`、`scripts/resource_monitor_benchmark.py`、`scripts/regression_nightly_backfill.py`
- `use_internal_pipeline` 默认已切为 `true`（B1 达标后执行）
- 独立态 30 样本回归已达标：`reports/regression/baseline_v30_independent_20260226.md` / `reports/regression/b1_gate_v30_independent_20260226.md`
- 核心目标已达成，最终验收仍有 3 项待收口（论坛实网回归/监控压测/回归扩样）
- 推荐运行环境：`uv` + Python `3.10.x`（统一使用 `uv` 管理虚拟环境与依赖）

## 快速开始（骨架阶段）

0. 准备环境（推荐统一使用 `uv`）
- `uv python install 3.10.18`
- `uv venv --python 3.10.18 .venv-p310`
- `.\.venv-p310\Scripts\Activate.ps1`
- `uv pip install -e ".[asr,llm,forum,test]"`
- 说明：后续命令默认使用 `uv run python ...` 执行，可不依赖激活环境。
- If you still use the legacy `domain/video/pre` chain, set `CLONECUT_FFMPEG_BIN_DIR=D:/allcut/ffmpeg/bin` in `.env`.

1. 复制配置模板
- `config/settings.yaml.example` -> `config/settings.yaml`
- `config/forum_settings.yaml.example` -> `config/forum_settings.yaml`
- `machines.txt.example` -> `machines.txt`

2. 启动监控节点（示例）
- `1-启动监控节点.bat`

3. 启动工作节点（示例）
- `2-启动工作节点.bat`
- 启动脚本默认优先使用 `.venv-p310\Scripts\python.exe`，不存在时回退到 PATH 中的 `python`

4. 高端口联调（防冲突）
- `scripts/3-高端口联调启动.bat`
- `scripts/4-运行冒烟测试.bat`
- `scripts/5-灰度回滚停服.bat`

## Env Rebuild (`.venv-p310`)

```powershell
uv python install 3.10.18
Remove-Item -Recurse -Force .venv-p310
uv venv --python 3.10.18 .venv-p310
uv pip install --python .\.venv-p310\Scripts\python.exe -e ".[asr,llm,forum,test]"
```

If you still use the legacy `domain/video/pre` chain, ensure `.env` contains `CLONECUT_FFMPEG_BIN_DIR=D:/allcut/ffmpeg/bin`.
Without that variable, step6 may fail when it calls `ffmpeg`.

## 关键文档

- `docs/开发文档.md`
- `docs/任务模型说明.md`
- `docs/配置规范.md`
- `docs/独立化实施计划.md`
- `docs/测试验证说明.md`
- `docs/真实样本验收执行清单.md`
- `docs/真实样本验收报告模板.md`
- `docs/regression_samples_manifest.example.json`
- `docs/文档二次评审-2026-02-25.md`

## 本地高端口联调

```powershell
uv run python tests/smoke/smoke_local.py --monitor-port 18200 --worker-port 18205
```

```powershell
uv run python tests/smoke/smoke_local.py --monitor-port 18200 --worker-port 18205 --enable-tts --voice-name 你的可用音色
```

## 回归门槛（B1）

```powershell
uv run python scripts/regression_compare.py `
  --legacy-dir data/regression/legacy `
  --clonecut-dir data/regression/clonecut `
  --manifest data/regression/manifest/samples_v2_30.json `
  --output-json reports/regression/baseline_v30.json `
  --output-markdown reports/regression/baseline_v30.md `
  --duration-tolerance-seconds 1.0 `
  --frame-tolerance 24 `
  --subtitle-cue-tolerance 2 `
  --subtitle-line-tolerance 4 `
  --audio-duration-tolerance-seconds 1.0
```

```powershell
uv run python scripts/regression_gate.py `
  --report reports/regression/baseline_v30.json `
  --output-json reports/regression/b1_gate_v30.json `
  --output-markdown reports/regression/b1_gate_v30.md `
  --min-samples 30 `
  --min-pass-rate 0.9 `
  --max-subtitle-presence-mismatch-ratio 0.05 `
  --max-duration-frame-exceed-ratio 0.10 `
  --max-fallback-used-ratio 0.10
```

## 最终验收收口脚本（独立执行）

- 论坛实网端到端回归（发现 -> 下载 -> 处理 -> 回帖/附件上传）  
  使用 `clonecut` 自身配置/环境变量，不依赖旧项目路径：

```powershell
$env:FORUM_BASE_URL = "https://your.forum.host"
$env:FORUM_TARGET_URL = "https://your.forum.host/forum-2-1.html"
$env:FORUM_USERNAME = "your_forum_user"
$env:FORUM_PASSWORD = "your_forum_password"
```

```powershell
uv run python scripts/forum_e2e_regression.py `
  --forum-config config/forum_settings.yaml `
  --monitor-url http://127.0.0.1:18200 `
  --worker-url http://127.0.0.1:18205 `
  --cycles 3 `
  --execute-reply `
  --stop-on-failure
```

- 资源监控精度与性能压测（CPU/内存/GPU）：

```powershell
uv run python scripts/resource_monitor_benchmark.py `
  --monitor-interval-seconds 1.0 `
  --sample-interval-seconds 1.0 `
  --cpu-workers 2 `
  --memory-load-mb 512
```

- nightly 失败回灌与长期趋势：

```powershell
uv run python scripts/regression_nightly_backfill.py `
  --report-json reports/regression/baseline_nightly.json `
  --gate-json reports/regression/b1_gate_nightly.json `
  --source-manifest data/regression/manifest/samples_v2_30.json `
  --failed-manifest data/regression/manifest/samples_failed_backfill.json `
  --history-jsonl reports/regression/nightly_history.jsonl `
  --summary-markdown reports/regression/nightly_backfill_summary.md
```

## 可选执行引擎

- TTS/音色克隆内置引擎（默认开启）：`CLONECUT_TTS_ENABLE=true`
- TTS 引擎选择：`CLONECUT_TTS_ENGINE=local|http|auto`（默认 `local`）
- 缺省音色补全（可选）：`CLONECUT_TTS_DEFAULT_VOICE=...`
- 外部视频命令桥接（默认关闭）：`CLONECUT_VIDEO_COMMAND_TEMPLATE=...`
- stage6 可选时长引导：`CLONECUT_STAGE6_DURATION_GUIDE_PATH=...`
- 扩样清单（30样本）：`data/regression/manifest/samples_v2_30.json`

### 内置链路说明（2026-02-26）

- 目标：不依赖旧项目运行时，保持 CloneCut 内置链路可独立运行。
- 行为：
  - `stage4_asr` 只使用 `faster_whisper` / sidecar / timeline fallback；
  - `stage6_clip` 支持文本匹配剪辑与时长引导：
    - 时长引导：`CLONECUT_STAGE6_DURATION_GUIDE_PATH=...`
    - 文本匹配剪辑：`CLONECUT_STAGE6_CLIP_TEXT_MATCH=true`
  - 其余 stage 继续走新架构链路。
  - 严格等价模式：`CLONECUT_STRICT_EQUIVALENCE=true` 时禁止 stage2/4/6/7 的 copy/timeline fallback。
- 验证结果：`uv run python -m pytest -q` -> `72 passed, 1 skipped`（2026-02-26 本地校验）；30 样本独立态回归 `baseline_v30_independent_20260226` 为 `100%`，对应 B1 `b1_gate_v30_independent_20260226` 为 `PASS`。

## 生产并行运行建议

- 旧系统：`8000/8005`
- CloneCut：`8200/8205`
- Redis 前缀：`clonecut_monitor:`、`clonecut_worker:`

shell_command output=Exit code: 0 Wall time: 0.4 seconds Output: from __future__ import annotations import json import mimetypes from pathlib import Path import time from typing import Any, Mapping ...
Show output payload 
Exit code: 0
Wall time: 0.4 seconds
Output:
from __future__ import annotations

import json
import mimetypes
from pathlib import Path
import time
from typing import Any, Mapping

import requests


def _normalize_api_base(api_base: str) -> str:
    text = str(api_base or "").strip().rstrip("/")
    if not text:
        raise ValueError("api_base is required")
    return text


def _resolve_api_url(api_base: str, path: str) -> str:
    base = _normalize_api_base(api_base)
    suffix = str(path or "").strip()
    if not suffix:
        return base
    if not suffix.startswith("/"):
        suffix = "/" + suffix
    return base + suffix


def _build_auth_headers(api_token: str) -> dict[str, str]:
    token = str(api_token or "").strip()
    if not token:
        return {}
    return {"Authorization": f"Bearer {token}"}


def _response_json(response: Any) -> dict[str, Any]:
    try:
        payload = response.json()
    except Exception as exc:
        status_code = getattr(response, "status_code", "unknown")
        text = str(getattr(response, "text", "") or "").strip()
        raise RuntimeError(f"api returned non-json response: status={status_code} body={text}") from exc
    if not isinstance(payload, dict):
        raise RuntimeError(f"api returned invalid payload type: {type(payload)!r}")
    return payload


def _ensure_success_payload(payload: Mapping[str, Any], response: Any, context: str) -> dict[str, Any]:
    body = dict(payload or {})
    if bool(body.get("success")):
        return body
    status_code = getattr(response, "status_code", "unknown")
    error = str(body.get("error") or "").strip() or f"{context} failed"
    raise RuntimeError(f"{context} failed: status={status_code} error={error}")


def _coerce_form_value(value: Any) -> str:
    if isinstance(value, (dict, list)):
        return json.dumps(value, ensure_ascii=False)
    if value is None:
        return ""
    return str(value)


def submit_openclaw_video_task(
    api_base: str,
    video_path: str | Path,
    *,
    api_token: str = "",
    task_id: str = "",
    source: str = "openclaw_client",
    stage5_model_name: str = "",
    extra_form: Mapping[str, Any] | None = None,
    timeout_seconds: float = 30.0,
    session: Any = None,
) -> dict[str, Any]:
    client = session or requests
    file_path = Path(video_path).expanduser()
    if not file_path.exists() or not file_path.is_file():
        raise FileNotFoundError(f"video file not found: {file_path}")

    form: dict[str, str] = {"source": source}
    if task_id:
        form["task_id"] = str(task_id).strip()
    if stage5_model_name:
        form["stage5_model_name"] = str(stage5_model_name).strip()
    for key, value in dict(extra_form or {}).items():
        text = _coerce_form_value(value)
        if text:
            form[str(key)] = text

    content_type = mimetypes.guess_type(file_path.name)[0] or "application/octet-stream"
    with file_path.open("rb") as file_handle:
        response = client.post(
            _resolve_api_url(api_base, "/api/tasks/upload-video"),
            data=form,
            files={"file": (file_path.name, file_handle, content_type)},
            headers=_build_auth_headers(api_token),
            timeout=max(1.0, float(timeout_seconds)),
        )
    payload = _response_json(response)
    return _ensure_success_payload(payload, response, context="submit openclaw video task")


def fetch_openclaw_result(
    api_base: str,
    task_id: str,
    *,
    api_token: str = "",
    timeout_seconds: float = 15.0,
    session: Any = None,
) -> dict[str, Any]:
    client = session or requests
    resolved_task_id = str(task_id or "").strip()
    if not resolved_task_id:
        raise ValueError("task_id is required")

    response = client.get(
        _resolve_api_url(api_base, f"/api/tasks/{resolved_task_id}/openclaw-result"),
        headers=_build_auth_headers(api_token),
        timeout=max(1.0, float(timeout_seconds)),
    )
    payload = _response_json(response)
    return _ensure_success_payload(payload, response, context="fetch openclaw result")


def wait_for_openclaw_result(
    api_base: str,
    task_id: str,
    *,
    api_token: str = "",
    timeout_seconds: float = 1800.0,
    poll_interval_seconds: float = 5.0,
    request_timeout_seconds: float = 15.0,
    session: Any = None,
) -> dict[str, Any]:
    deadline = time.time() + max(1.0, float(timeout_seconds))
    while True:
        payload = fetch_openclaw_result(
            api_base=api_base,
            task_id=task_id,
            api_token=api_token,
            timeout_seconds=request_timeout_seconds,
            session=session,
        )
        result = payload.get("openclaw_result") if isinstance(payload.get("openclaw_result"), dict) else {}
        status = str(result.get("status") or "").strip().lower()
        if status in {"completed", "failed", "cancelled"}:
            return payload
        if time.time() >= deadline:
            raise TimeoutError(f"wait openclaw result timed out: task_id={task_id} status={status or 'unknown'}")
        time.sleep(max(0.2, float(poll_interval_seconds)))


def run_openclaw_video_task(
    api_base: str,
    video_path: str | Path,
    *,
    api_token: str = "",
    task_id: str = "",
    source: str = "openclaw_client",
    stage5_model_name: str = "",
    extra_form: Mapping[str, Any] | None = None,
    wait: bool = True,
    submit_timeout_seconds: float = 30.0,
    wait_timeout_seconds: float = 1800.0,
    poll_interval_seconds: float = 5.0,
    request_timeout_seconds: float = 15.0,
    session: Any = None,
) -> dict[str, Any]:
    submitted = submit_openclaw_video_task(
        api_base=api_base,
        video_path=video_path,
        api_token=api_token,
        task_id=task_id,
        source=source,
        stage5_model_name=stage5_model_name,
        extra_form=extra_form,
        timeout_seconds=submit_timeout_seconds,
        session=session,
    )
    output = {"submit": submitted}
    if not wait:
        return output

    resolved_task_id = str(submitted.get("task_id") or "").strip()
    if not resolved_task_id:
        raise RuntimeError("submit response missing task_id")
    output["result"] = wait_for_openclaw_result(
        api_base=api_base,
        task_id=resolved_task_id,
        api_token=api_token,
        timeout_seconds=wait_timeout_seconds,
        poll_interval_seconds=poll_interval_seconds,
        request_timeout_seconds=request_timeout_seconds,
        session=session,
    )
    return output


__all__ = [
    "submit_openclaw_video_task",
    "fetch_openclaw_result",
    "wait_for_openclaw_result",
    "run_openclaw_video_task",
]
Tool Result #232 shell_command call_vVWjjGnFaJUATmTdQ3h6BYfJ exit 0 09:39:58
shell_command output=Exit code: 0 Wall time: 0.4 seconds Output: from __future__ import annotations import argparse import copy import json import logging import mimetypes import os from pathlib imp...
Show output payload 
Exit code: 0
Wall time: 0.4 seconds
Output:
from __future__ import annotations

import argparse
import copy
import json
import logging
import mimetypes
import os
from pathlib import Path
import shutil
from datetime import datetime
from functools import wraps
from typing import Any
import uuid

from flask import Flask, jsonify, request, send_file
from jinja2 import ChoiceLoader, FileSystemLoader
from werkzeug.utils import secure_filename

from apps.web.mock_data import (
    build_worker_resources,
    build_worker_status,
    build_worker_tasks,
)
from apps.web import STATIC_DIR, TEMPLATE_DIR, render_worker_dashboard
from apps.worker.service import WorkerService
from infra.config.loader import load_app_config
from infra.logging.setup import setup_logging


RESULT_SCHEMA_VERSION = "1.0"


def _parse_optional_bool(value: Any) -> bool | None:
    if value is None:
        return None
    if isinstance(value, bool):
        return value
    text = str(value).strip().lower()
    if not text:
        return None
    if text in {"1", "true", "yes", "y", "on"}:
        return True
    if text in {"0", "false", "no", "n", "off"}:
        return False
    return None


def _should_start_embedded_worker(cfg: Any) -> bool:
    env_value = _parse_optional_bool(os.getenv("CLONECUT_API_START_WORKER"))
    if env_value is not None:
        return env_value

    raw = getattr(cfg, "raw", None)
    if isinstance(raw, dict):
        api_cfg = raw.get("api", {}) or {}
        cfg_value = _parse_optional_bool(
            api_cfg.get("start_worker", api_cfg.get("start_embedded_worker"))
        )
        if cfg_value is not None:
            return cfg_value

    return False


def create_app(service: WorkerService) -> Flask:
    app = Flask(
        __name__,
        template_folder=str(TEMPLATE_DIR),
        static_folder=str(STATIC_DIR),
        static_url_path="/web/static",
    )
    if app.jinja_loader is not None:
        app.jinja_loader = ChoiceLoader([app.jinja_loader, FileSystemLoader(str(TEMPLATE_DIR))])

    _api_token: str = os.getenv("CLONECUT_API_TOKEN", "").strip()
    _web_mock_mode = os.getenv("CLONECUT_WEB_MOCK_MODE", "").strip().lower() == "true"
    _api_upload_root = Path(getattr(service.config, "input_dir", "input")) / "_api_uploads"
    _api_upload_root.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

    def _mock_mode_from_request() -> bool:
        if _web_mock_mode:
            return True
        raw = request.args.get("mock", "").strip().lower()
        return raw in {"1", "true", "yes"}

    def _parse_optional_bool(value: Any) -> Any:
        if value is None:
            return None
        if isinstance(value, bool):
            return value
        text = str(value).strip().lower()
        if not text:
            return None
        if text in {"1", "true", "yes", "y", "on"}:
            return True
        if text in {"0", "false", "no", "n", "off"}:
            return False
        return None

    def _parse_json_object_field(field_name: str) -> dict[str, Any]:
        raw = str(request.form.get(field_name, "") or "").strip()
        if not raw:
            return {}
        try:
            parsed = json.loads(raw)
        except Exception as exc:
            raise ValueError(f"invalid {field_name}: {exc}") from exc
        if not isinstance(parsed, dict):
            raise ValueError(f"invalid {field_name}: expected JSON object")
        return dict(parsed)

    def _resolve_download_path(task: dict[str, Any]) -> Path | None:
        result = task.get("result") if isinstance(task.get("result"), dict) else {}
        artifacts = result.get("artifacts") if isinstance(result.get("artifacts"), list) else []
        for artifact in artifacts:
            if not isinstance(artifact, dict) or not artifact.get("is_primary"):
                continue
            candidate = str(artifact.get("path") or "").strip()
            if not candidate:
                continue
            path = Path(candidate)
            if path.exists() and path.is_file():
                return path
        upload = result.get("upload") if isinstance(result.get("upload"), dict) else {}
        candidates = [
            str(upload.get("uploaded_path") or "").strip(),
            str(task.get("output_path") or "").strip(),
            str(result.get("named_output_path") or "").strip(),
            str(result.get("output_path") or "").strip(),
        ]
        for candidate in candidates:
            if not candidate:
                continue
            path = Path(candidate)
            if path.exists() and path.is_file():
                return path
        return None

    def _build_status_url(task_id: str) -> str:
        return f"/api/tasks/{task_id}"

    def _build_download_url(task_id: str) -> str:
        return f"/api/tasks/{task_id}/download"

    def _build_artifacts_url(task_id: str) -> str:
        return f"/api/tasks/{task_id}/artifacts"

    def _build_artifact_download_url(task_id: str, artifact_id: str) -> str:
        return f"/api/tasks/{task_id}/artifacts/{artifact_id}/download"

    def _build_openclaw_result_url(task_id: str) -> str:
        return f"/api/tasks/{task_id}/openclaw-result"

    def _find_task_artifact(task: dict[str, Any], artifact_id: str) -> dict[str, Any] | None:
        result = task.get("result") if isinstance(task.get("result"), dict) else {}
        artifacts = result.get("artifacts") if isinstance(result.get("artifacts"), list) else []
        target = str(artifact_id or "").strip()
        if not target:
            return None
        for artifact in artifacts:
            if not isinstance(artifact, dict):
                continue
            if str(artifact.get("artifact_id") or "").strip() == target:
                return artifact
        return None

    def _artifact_ref_by_id(artifacts_by_id: dict[str, dict[str, Any]], artifact_id: str) -> dict[str, Any] | None:
        target = str(artifact_id or "").strip()
        if not target:
            return None
        artifact = artifacts_by_id.get(target)
        if not isinstance(artifact, dict):
            return None
        return {
            "artifact_id": target,
            "role": artifact.get("role"),
            "kind": artifact.get("kind"),
            "filename": artifact.get("filename"),
            "path": artifact.get("path"),
            "relative_path": artifact.get("relative_path"),
            "download_url": artifact.get("download_url"),
            "is_primary": bool(artifact.get("is_primary")),
        }

    def _compact_json_like(value: Any) -> Any:
        if isinstance(value, dict):
            compacted: dict[str, Any] = {}
            for key, item in value.items():
                normalized = _compact_json_like(item)
                if normalized in (None, "", [], {}):
                    continue
                compacted[str(key)] = normalized
            return compacted
        if isinstance(value, list):
            compacted_list = [_compact_json_like(item) for item in value]
            return [item for item in compacted_list if item not in (None, "", [], {})]
        return value

    def _build_openclaw_result(task: dict[str, Any]) -> dict[str, Any]:
        decorated = _decorate_task_for_api(task, include_openclaw_result=False)
        task_id = str(decorated.get("task_id") or "").strip()
        result = decorated.get("result") if isinstance(decorated.get("result"), dict) else {}
        render_manifest = result.get("render_manifest") if isinstance(result.get("render_manifest"), dict) else {}
        artifacts = result.get("artifacts") if isinstance(result.get("artifacts"), list) else []
        artifacts_by_id = {
            str(item.get("artifact_id") or "").strip(): item
            for item in artifacts
            if isinstance(item, dict) and str(item.get("artifact_id") or "").strip()
        }
        videos = render_manifest.get("videos") if isinstance(render_manifest.get("videos"), dict) else {}
        subtitles = render_manifest.get("subtitles") if isinstance(render_manifest.get("subtitles"), dict) else {}
        texts = render_manifest.get("texts") if isinstance(render_manifest.get("texts"), dict) else {}
        context = render_manifest.get("context") if isinstance(render_manifest.get("context"), dict) else {}
        cover = render_manifest.get("cover") if isinstance(render_manifest.get("cover"), dict) else {}
        logs = render_manifest.get("logs") if isinstance(render_manifest.get("logs"), dict) else {}
        pipeline_state = (
            render_manifest.get("pipeline_state") if isinstance(render_manifest.get("pipeline_state"), dict) else {}
        )

        openclaw_result = {
            "schema_version": RESULT_SCHEMA_VERSION,
            "task_id": task_id,
            "status": decorated.get("status"),
            "is_ready": str(decorated.get("status") or "").strip().lower() == "completed",
            "executed_mode": result.get("executed_mode"),
            "status_url": decorated.get("status_url"),
            "download_url": decorated.get("download_url"),
            "artifacts_url": decorated.get("artifacts_url"),
            "progress": {
                "current_stage": decorated.get("current_stage"),
                "stage_checkpoint": decorated.get("stage_checkpoint"),
                "last_completed_step": pipeline_state.get("last_completed_step"),
                "last_completed_step_name": pipeline_state.get("last_completed_step_name"),
            },
            "outputs": {
                "final_video": _artifact_ref_by_id(artifacts_by_id, str(videos.get("primary") or "")),
                "subtitled_video": _artifact_ref_by_id(artifacts_by_id, str(videos.get("subtitled") or "")),
                "no_subtitle_video": _artifact_ref_by_id(artifacts_by_id, str(videos.get("no_subtitle") or "")),
                "coverless_video": _artifact_ref_by_id(artifacts_by_id, str(videos.get("coverless") or "")),
                "alternate_video": _artifact_ref_by_id(artifacts_by_id, str(videos.get("alternate") or "")),
                "subtitle_srt": _artifact_ref_by_id(artifacts_by_id, str(subtitles.get("srt") or "")),
                "subtitle_ass": _artifact_ref_by_id(artifacts_by_id, str(subtitles.get("ass") or "")),
                "script_text": _artifact_ref_by_id(
                    artifacts_by_id,
                    str(texts.get("script") or subtitles.get("script") or ""),
                ),
                "clip_text": _artifact_ref_by_id(artifacts_by_id, str(texts.get("clip_text") or "")),
                "cover_image": _artifact_ref_by_id(artifacts_by_id, str(cover.get("image") or "")),
                "forum_post_info": _artifact_ref_by_id(artifacts_by_id, str(context.get("forum_post_info") or "")),
                "processing_log": _artifact_ref_by_id(artifacts_by_id, str(logs.get("processing") or "")),
            },
            "manifest": {
                "primary_artifact_id": render_manifest.get("primary_artifact_id"),
                "primary_download_url": render_manifest.get("primary_download_url"),
                "artifact_count": render_manifest.get("artifact_count"),
            },
        }
        return _compact_json_like(openclaw_result)

Output:
from __future__ import annotations

import argparse
import logging
import os
from typing import Any
import uuid
from datetime import datetime

from flask import Flask, jsonify, request
from jinja2 import ChoiceLoader, FileSystemLoader

from apps.web.mock_data import (
    build_worker_resources,
    build_worker_status,
    build_worker_tasks,
)
from apps.web import STATIC_DIR, TEMPLATE_DIR, render_worker_dashboard
from apps.worker.service import WorkerService
from infra.config.loader import load_app_config
from infra.logging.setup import setup_logging


def create_app(service: WorkerService) -> Flask:
    app = Flask(
        __name__,
        template_folder=str(TEMPLATE_DIR),
        static_folder=str(STATIC_DIR),
        static_url_path="/web/static",
    )
    if app.jinja_loader is not None:
        app.jinja_loader = ChoiceLoader([app.jinja_loader, FileSystemLoader(str(TEMPLATE_DIR))])
    _web_mock_mode = os.getenv("CLONECUT_WEB_MOCK_MODE", "").strip().lower() == "true"

    def _mock_mode_from_request() -> bool:
        if _web_mock_mode:
            return True
        raw = request.args.get("mock", "").strip().lower()
        return raw in {"1", "true", "yes"}

    @app.get("/")
    def dashboard() -> Any:
        return render_worker_dashboard(
            {
                "page_title": "CloneCut Worker Dashboard",
                "dashboard_mode": "worker",
                "api_base": "/api/worker",
                "mock_mode": "true" if _mock_mode_from_request() else "false",
            }
        )

    @app.get("/web/worker")
    def worker_dashboard() -> Any:
        return render_worker_dashboard(
            {
                "page_title": "CloneCut Worker Dashboard",
                "dashboard_mode": "worker",
                "api_base": "/api/worker",
                "mock_mode": "true" if _mock_mode_from_request() else "false",
            }
        )

    @app.get("/health")
    def health() -> Any:
        return jsonify({"status": "ok"})

    @app.get("/web/mock/worker/status")
    def mock_worker_status() -> Any:
        return jsonify({"success": True, **build_worker_status()})

    @app.get("/web/mock/worker/resources")
    def mock_worker_resources() -> Any:
        return jsonify({"success": True, "resources": build_worker_resources()})

    @app.get("/web/mock/worker/tasks")
    def mock_worker_tasks() -> Any:
        limit_raw = request.args.get("limit", "10")
        try:
            limit = max(1, min(200, int(limit_raw)))
        except ValueError:
            limit = 10
        tasks = build_worker_tasks(limit=limit)
        return jsonify({"success": True, "tasks": tasks, "total": len(tasks), "limit": limit, "offset": 0})

    @app.post("/web/mock/worker/tasks")
    def mock_worker_submit() -> Any:
        payload = request.get_json(silent=True) or {}
        source_url = str(payload.get("source_url", "")).strip()
        if not source_url:
            return jsonify({"success": False, "error": "missing source_url"}), 400
        task_id = f"mock-submit-{datetime.now().strftime('%H%M%S')}-{uuid.uuid4().hex[:6]}"
        return jsonify({"success": True, "task_id": task_id}), 201

    @app.post("/api/worker/receive-task")
    def receive_task() -> Any:
        data = request.get_json(silent=True) or {}
        ok, task_id, error = service.submit(data)
        if not ok:
            return jsonify({"success": False, "error": error or "invalid task payload"}), 400
        return jsonify({"success": True, "task_id": task_id, "message": "task queued"})

    def _list_tasks_impl() -> Any:
        status = request.args.get("status")
        limit_raw = request.args.get("limit", "20")
        offset_raw = request.args.get("offset", "0")
        try:
            limit = max(1, min(200, int(limit_raw)))
            offset = max(0, int(offset_raw))
        except ValueError:
            return jsonify({"success": False, "error": "invalid pagination params"}), 400

        try:
            payload = service.list_tasks(status=status, limit=limit, offset=offset)
        except ValueError as exc:
            return jsonify({"success": False, "error": str(exc)}), 400
        return jsonify({"success": True, **payload})

    def _create_task_impl() -> Any:
        data = request.get_json(silent=True) or {}
        ok, task_id, error = service.submit(data)
        if not ok:
            return jsonify({"success": False, "error": error or "invalid task payload"}), 400
        return jsonify({"success": True, "task_id": task_id, "message": "task queued"}), 201

    @app.get("/api/worker/status")
    def worker_status() -> Any:
        return jsonify(service.get_status())

    @app.get("/api/status")
    def status_compat() -> Any:
        return jsonify(service.get_status())

    @app.get("/api/worker/resources")
    def worker_resources() -> Any:
        return jsonify({"success": True, "resources": service.get_resources()})

    @app.get("/api/resources")
    def resources_compat() -> Any:
        return jsonify({"success": True, "resources": service.get_resources()})

    @app.get("/api/worker/tasks")
    def worker_tasks() -> Any:
        return _list_tasks_impl()

    @app.get("/api/tasks")
    def tasks_compat() -> Any:
        return _list_tasks_impl()

    @app.post("/api/worker/tasks")
    def worker_create_task() -> Any:
        return _create_task_impl()

    @app.post("/api/tasks")
    def create_task_compat() -> Any:
        return _create_task_impl()

    @app.get("/api/worker/task/<task_id>")
    def worker_task(task_id: str) -> Any:
        task = service.get_task(task_id)
        if task is None:
            return jsonify({"success": False, "error": "task not found"}), 404
        return jsonify({"success": True, "task": task})

    return app


def _run_http(app: Flask, host: str, port: int, logger: logging.Logger) -> None:
    try:
        from waitress import serve

        logger.info("serving with waitress on %s:%s", host, port)
        serve(app, host=host, port=port)
    except Exception:
        logger.info("waitress unavailable, fallback to flask builtin server on %s:%s", host, port)
        app.run(host=host, port=port, debug=False, use_reloader=False)


def main() -> int:
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description="CloneCut worker service")
    parser.add_argument("--port", type=int, default=None, help="override service port")
    parser.add_argument("--host", type=str, default=None, help="override service host")
    parser.add_argument("--config", type=str, default="config/settings.yaml", help="config path")
    args = parser.parse_args()

    cfg = load_app_config(args.config)
    cfg.role = "worker"
    if args.port:
        cfg.port = args.port
    if args.host:
        cfg.host = args.host
    if cfg.redis_namespace == "clonecut_monitor:":
        cfg.redis_namespace = "clonecut_worker:"

    setup_logging(cfg.log_dir, cfg.role)
    logger = logging.getLogger("apps.worker")
    logger.info("worker booting")
    logger.info("env=%s role=%s host=%s port=%s", cfg.env, cfg.role, cfg.host, cfg.port)
    logger.info(
        "redis=%s:%s db=%s ns=%s",
        cfg.redis_host,
        cfg.redis_port,
        cfg.redis_db,
        cfg.redis_namespace,
    )

    service = WorkerService(config=cfg, logger=logger)
    service.start()
    app = create_app(service)

    _run_http(app=app, host=cfg.host, port=cfg.port, logger=logger)
    return 0


if __name__ == "__main__":
    raise SystemExit(main())

            return jsonify({"success": False, "error": str(exc)}), 400
        except Exception as exc:

                shutil.rmtree(stored_dir, ignore_errors=True)
            return jsonify({"success": False, "error": f"upload task failed: {exc}"}), 500

                    "download_url": f"/api/tasks/{resolved_task_id}/download",

                }
            ),
            201,
        )

    @app.get("/api/tasks/<task_id>")
    def task_detail(task_id: str) -> Any:
        task = service.get_task(task_id)
        if task is None:
            return jsonify({"success": False, "error": "task not found"}), 404
        return jsonify({"success": True, "task": _decorate_task_for_api(task, include_openclaw_result=True)})

    @app.get("/api/tasks/<task_id>/artifacts")
    def task_artifacts(task_id: str) -> Any:
        task = service.get_task(task_id)
        if task is None:
            return jsonify({"success": False, "error": "task not found"}), 404
        decorated = _decorate_task_for_api(task)
        result = decorated.get("result") if isinstance(decorated.get("result"), dict) else {}
        artifacts = result.get("artifacts") if isinstance(result.get("artifacts"), list) else []
        render_manifest = result.get("render_manifest") if isinstance(result.get("render_manifest"), dict) else {}
        return jsonify(
            {
                "success": True,
                "task_id": task_id,
                "artifacts": artifacts,
                "render_manifest": render_manifest,
                "download_url": _build_download_url(task_id),
            }
        )

    @app.get("/api/tasks/<task_id>/openclaw-result")
    def task_openclaw_result(task_id: str) -> Any:
        task = service.get_task(task_id)
        if task is None:
            return jsonify({"success": False, "error": "task not found"}), 404
        return jsonify(
            {
                "success": True,
                "task_id": task_id,
                "openclaw_result": _build_openclaw_result(task),
            }
        )

    @app.get("/api/tasks/<task_id>/download")
    @_require_token
    def task_download(task_id: str) -> Any:
        task = service.get_task(task_id)
        if task is None:
            return jsonify({"success": False, "error": "task not found"}), 404
        status = str(task.get("status") or "").strip().lower()
        if status not in {"completed", "uploading", "processing"}:
            return jsonify({"success": False, "error": f"task output not ready: status={status or 'unknown'}"}), 409

        download_path = _resolve_download_path(task)
        if download_path is None:
            return jsonify({"success": False, "error": "downloadable output not found"}), 404

        return send_file(
            download_path,
            as_attachment=True,
            download_name=download_path.name,
            mimetype="video/mp4",
            conditional=True,
        )

    @app.get("/api/tasks/<task_id>/artifacts/<artifact_id>/download")
    @_require_token
    def task_artifact_download(task_id: str, artifact_id: str) -> Any:
        task = service.get_task(task_id)
        if task is None:
            return jsonify({"success": False, "error": "task not found"}), 404
        artifact = _find_task_artifact(task, artifact_id)
        if artifact is None:
            return jsonify({"success": False, "error": "artifact not found"}), 404

        artifact_path = Path(str(artifact.get("path") or "").strip())
        if not artifact_path.exists() or not artifact_path.is_file():
            return jsonify({"success": False, "error": "artifact file not found"}), 404

        guessed_mime, _ = mimetypes.guess_type(artifact_path.name)
        mime_type = str(artifact.get("mime_type") or guessed_mime or "application/octet-stream")
        return send_file(
            artifact_path,
            as_attachment=True,
            download_name=artifact_path.name,
            mimetype=mime_type,
            conditional=True,
        )

    @app.post("/api/tasks/<task_id>/cancel")
    @_require_token
    def cancel_task(task_id: str) -> Any:
        ok, error = service.cancel_task(task_id)
        if not ok:
            code = 404 if error == "task not found" else 409
            return jsonify({"success": False, "error": error}), code
        return jsonify({"success": True, "task_id": task_id})

    @app.post("/api/tasks/<task_id>/retry")
    @_require_token
    def retry_task(task_id: str) -> Any:
        ok, error = service.retry_task(task_id)
        if not ok:
            code = 404 if error == "task not found" else 409
            return jsonify({"success": False, "error": error}), code
        return jsonify({"success": True, "task_id": task_id})

    return app


def _run_http(app: Flask, host: str, port: int, logger: logging.Logger) -> None:
    try:
        from waitress import serve

        logger.info("serving with waitress on %s:%s", host, port)
        serve(app, host=host, port=port)
    except Exception:
        logger.info("waitress unavailable, fallback to flask builtin server on %s:%s", host, port)
        app.run(host=host, port=port, debug=False, use_reloader=False)


def main() -> int:
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description="CloneCut API service")
    parser.add_argument("--port", type=int, default=None, help="override service port")
    parser.add_argument("--host", type=str, default=None, help="override service host")
    parser.add_argument("--config", type=str, default="config/settings.yaml", help="config path")
    args = parser.parse_args()

    cfg = load_app_config(args.config)
    cfg.role = "api"
    cfg.port = args.port or cfg.port
    cfg.host = args.host or cfg.host
    if cfg.redis_namespace == "clonecut_monitor:":
        cfg.redis_namespace = "clonecut_worker:"

    setup_logging(cfg.log_dir, cfg.role)
    logger = logging.getLogger("apps.api")
    logger.info("api booting env=%s host=%s port=%s", cfg.env, cfg.host, cfg.port)

    service = WorkerService(config=cfg, logger=logger)
    embedded_worker_started = _should_start_embedded_worker(cfg)
    if embedded_worker_started:
        logger.info("api embedded worker enabled")
        service.start()
    else:
        logger.info("api embedded worker disabled; expecting dedicated worker service")
    app = create_app(service)
    try:
        _run_http(app, cfg.host, cfg.port, logger)
    finally:
        if embedded_worker_started:
            service.stop()
    return 0


if __name__ == "__main__":
    raise SystemExit(main())
Tool Result #241 shell_command call_BkrIXEiqcklwC8gTnYJ8mFQL exit 0 09:40:06
shell_command output=Exit code: 0 Wall time: 0.4 seconds Output: from __future__ import annotations from dataclasses import dataclass, field from pathlib import Path from typing import Any, Dict imp...
Show output payload 
Exit code: 0
Wall time: 0.4 seconds
Output:
from __future__ import annotations

from dataclasses import dataclass, field
from pathlib import Path
from typing import Any, Dict
import os

from shared.errors.base import ConfigError


try:
    import yaml
except Exception:  # pragma: no cover
    yaml = None

try:
    from dotenv import load_dotenv
except Exception:  # pragma: no cover
    load_dotenv = None


@dataclass
class AppConfig:
    name: str = "clonecut"
    env: str = "production"
    role: str = "worker"
    host: str = "0.0.0.0"
    port: int = 8205

    redis_host: str = "127.0.0.1"
    redis_port: int = 6379
    redis_db: int = 0
    redis_password: str = ""
    redis_namespace: str = "clonecut_worker:"

    input_dir: str = "D:/clonecut/input"
    output_dir: str = "D:/clonecut/output"
    log_dir: str = "D:/clonecut/logs"

    raw: Dict[str, Any] = field(default_factory=dict)


def _read_yaml(path: Path) -> Dict[str, Any]:
    if not path.exists():
        return {}
    if yaml is None:
        raise ConfigError("pyyaml is required to read yaml config files")
    with path.open("r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
        return yaml.safe_load(f) or {}


def _env(name: str, default: str = "") -> str:
    value = os.getenv(name)
    return default if value is None else value


def _load_dotenv_for_config(cfg_path: Path) -> None:
    if load_dotenv is None:
        return

    resolved = cfg_path.expanduser()
    if not resolved.is_absolute():
        resolved = (Path.cwd() / resolved).resolve()

    candidates = [
        resolved.parent / ".env",
        resolved.parent.parent / ".env",
        Path.cwd() / ".env",
    ]
    seen: set[Path] = set()
    for candidate in candidates:
        try:
            normalized = candidate.resolve()
        except Exception:
            normalized = candidate
        if normalized in seen or not normalized.exists():
            continue
        seen.add(normalized)
        load_dotenv(normalized, override=False)


def load_app_config(path: str | Path = "config/settings.yaml") -> AppConfig:
    cfg_path = Path(path)
    _load_dotenv_for_config(cfg_path)
    raw = _read_yaml(cfg_path)

    app = raw.get("app", {})
    redis = raw.get("redis", {})
    paths = raw.get("paths", {})

    role = _env("CLONECUT_ROLE", str(app.get("role", "worker")))
    port = int(_env("CLONECUT_PORT", str(app.get("port", 8205))))

    config = AppConfig(
        name=str(app.get("name", "clonecut")),
        env=_env("CLONECUT_ENV", str(app.get("env", "production"))),
        role=role,
        host=str(app.get("host", "0.0.0.0")),
        port=port,
        redis_host=_env("REDIS_HOST", str(redis.get("host", "127.0.0.1"))),
        redis_port=int(_env("REDIS_PORT", str(redis.get("port", 6379)))),
        redis_db=int(_env("REDIS_DB", str(redis.get("db", 0)))),
        redis_password=_env("REDIS_PASSWORD", str(redis.get("password", ""))),
        redis_namespace=_env("REDIS_NAMESPACE", str(redis.get("namespace", "clonecut_worker:"))),
        input_dir=_env("INPUT_DIR", str(paths.get("input_dir", "D:/clonecut/input"))),
        output_dir=_env("OUTPUT_DIR", str(paths.get("output_dir", "D:/clonecut/output"))),
        log_dir=_env("LOG_DIR", str(paths.get("log_dir", "D:/clonecut/logs"))),
        raw=raw,
    )

    if config.role not in {"monitor", "worker", "api"}:
        raise ConfigError(f"invalid role: {config.role}")

    if config.port <= 0:
        raise ConfigError(f"invalid port: {config.port}")

    return config

'.tmp_smoke_runtime'\n$inputDir = Join-Path $root '.tmp_smoke_input'\n$outputDir = Join-Path $root '.tmp_smoke_output'\n$logDir = Join-Path $root '.tmp_smoke_logs'\nNew-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $runDir,$inputDir,$outputDir,$logDir | Out-Null\n\n$envVars = @{\n  'REDIS_NAMESPACE' = 'clonecut_smoke_a3c2350:'\n  'INPUT_DIR' = $inputDir\n  'OUTPUT_DIR' = $outputDir\n  'LOG_DIR' = $logDir\n  'CLONECUT_API_START_WORKER' = 'false'\n}\n\n$workerOut = Join-Path $runDir 'worker.out.log'\n$workerErr = Join-Path $runDir 'worker.err.log'\n$apiOut = Join-Path $runDir 'api.out.log'\n$apiErr = Join-Path $runDir 'api.err.log'\n\n$workerProc = Start-Process -FilePath $py -ArgumentList @('-m','apps.worker.main','--host','127.0.0.1','--port','18315') -WorkingDirectory $root -PassThru -RedirectStandardOutput $workerOut -RedirectStandardError $workerErr -Environment $envVars\n$apiProc = Start-Process -FilePath $py -ArgumentList @('-m','apps.api.main','--host','127.0.0.1','--port','18310') -WorkingDirectory $root -PassThru -RedirectStandardOutput $apiOut -RedirectStandardError $apiErr -Environment $envVars\n\nfunction Wait-Health($url, $timeoutSec) {\n  $deadline = (Get-Date).AddSeconds($timeoutSec)\n  while ((Get-Date) -lt $deadline) {\n    try {\n      $resp = Invoke-RestMethod -Method Get -Uri $url -TimeoutSec 2\n      if ($resp.status -eq 'ok') { return $true }\n    } catch {}\n    Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500\n  }\n  return $false\n}\n\n$workerOk = Wait-Health 'http://127.0.0.1:18315/health' 30\n$apiOk = Wait-Health 'http://127.0.0.1:18310/health' 30\n\n$pidInfo = [ordered]@{\n  worker_pid = $workerProc.Id\n  api_pid = $apiProc.Id\n  worker_health = $workerOk\n  api_health = $apiOk\n  runtime_dir = $runDir\n  output_dir = $outputDir\n  input_dir = $inputDir\n  log_dir = $logDir\n}\n$pidPath = Join-Path $runDir 'pids.json'\n$pidInfo | ConvertTo-Json | Set-Content -LiteralPath $pidPath -Encoding UTF8\n$pidInfo | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 4",
  "workdir": "d:\\clonecut\\.worktrees\\smoke-test-mp4",
  "timeout_ms": 120000
}

$env:INPUT_DIR='$inputDir'; $env:OUTPUT_DIR='$outputDir'; $env:LOG_DIR='$logDir'; $env:CLONECUT_API_START_WORKER='false'; & '$py' -m apps.api.main --host 127.0.0.1 --port 18310\"\n\n$workerProc = Start-Process -FilePath 'powershell.exe' -ArgumentList @('-NoProfile','-Command',$workerCmd) -WorkingDirectory $root -PassThru -RedirectStandardOutput $workerOut -RedirectStandardError $workerErr\n$apiProc = Start-Process -FilePath 'powershell.exe' -ArgumentList @('-NoProfile','-Command',$apiCmd) -WorkingDirectory $root -PassThru -RedirectStandardOutput $apiOut -RedirectStandardError $apiErr\n\nfunction Wait-Health($url, $timeoutSec) {\n  $deadline = (Get-Date).AddSeconds($timeoutSec)\n  while ((Get-Date) -lt $deadline) {\n    try {\n      $resp = Invoke-RestMethod -Method Get -Uri $url -TimeoutSec 2\n      if ($resp.status -eq 'ok') { return $true }\n    } catch {}\n    Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500\n  }\n  return $false\n}\n\n$workerOk = Wait-Health 'http://127.0.0.1:18315/health' 40\n$apiOk = Wait-Health 'http://127.0.0.1:18310/health' 40\n\n$pidInfo = [ordered]@{\n  worker_pid = $workerProc.Id\n  api_pid = $apiProc.Id\n  worker_health = $workerOk\n  api_health = $apiOk\n  runtime_dir = $runDir\n  output_dir = $outputDir\n  input_dir = $inputDir\n  log_dir = $logDir\n}\n$pidPath = Join-Path $runDir 'pids.json'\n$pidInfo | ConvertTo-Json | Set-Content -LiteralPath $pidPath -Encoding UTF8\n$pidInfo | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 4",

assistant #297 commentary 09:42:21

我在补抓 /api/tasks/* 的完整 JSON，用来核对 artifacts 与 manifest 字段；刚才命令写法是 bash 风格，我换成 PowerShell 兼容写法继续。

{
  "command": "@'\nimport json\nimport requests\nbase = 'http://127.0.0.1:18310'\ntask_id = '5d042b64-7417-44a3-887f-b3424b36e504'\nfor path in [f'/api/tasks/{task_id}', f'/api/tasks/{task_id}/artifacts', f'/api/tasks/{task_id}/openclaw-result']:\n    resp = requests.get(base + path, timeout=20)\n    print('===', path, resp.status_code)\n    payload = resp.json()\n    print(json.dumps(payload, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))\n'@ | & 'd:\\clonecut\\.venv-p310\\Scripts\\python.exe' -",

assistant #342 commentary 09:44:02

我定位到一个关键事实：旧 pre/main/pipeline.py 现在主要残留在一个未接入主路径的历史 warm-runner 文件里。再补看一眼 artifacts 收集逻辑，确认为什么这次烟测没把字幕/封面映射出来。

Tool Call #343 shell_command call_PW22wPhEZVE47CSqAAPHVpo7 09:44:03

shell_command output=Exit code: 0 Wall time: 0.3 seconds Output: "artifact_id": artifact_id, "kind": kind, "role": role, "filename": path.name, "path": str(path), "relative_path": relative_path, "si...

                    "artifact_id": artifact_id,
                    "kind": kind,
                    "role": role,
                    "filename": path.name,

                    "is_primary": primary_resolved is not None and path == primary_resolved,

        return artifacts

    def _build_video_render_manifest(
        self,
        task: UnifiedTask,
        result: Dict[str, Any],
        artifacts: List[Dict[str, Any]],
    ) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        primary_artifact_id = ""
        videos: Dict[str, str] = {}
        subtitles: Dict[str, str] = {}
        texts: Dict[str, str] = {}
        context: Dict[str, str] = {}
        logs: Dict[str, str] = {}
        cover: Dict[str, str] = {}
        pipeline_state: Dict[str, Any] = {}

        for artifact in artifacts:
            artifact_id = str(artifact.get("artifact_id") or "").strip()
            role = str(artifact.get("role") or "").strip()
            path_text = str(artifact.get("path") or "").strip()
            if artifact.get("is_primary") and artifact_id:
                primary_artifact_id = artifact_id

            if role == "final_video" and artifact_id:
                videos["primary"] = artifact_id
            elif role == "video_subtitled" and artifact_id and "subtitled" not in videos:
                videos["subtitled"] = artifact_id
            elif role == "video_no_subtitle" and artifact_id:
                videos["no_subtitle"] = artifact_id
            elif role == "coverless_video" and artifact_id:
                videos["coverless"] = artifact_id
            elif role == "video" and artifact_id and "alternate" not in videos:
                videos["alternate"] = artifact_id
            elif role == "subtitle_srt" and artifact_id:
                subtitles["srt"] = artifact_id
            elif role == "subtitle_ass" and artifact_id:
                subtitles["ass"] = artifact_id
            elif role == "transcript_text" and artifact_id:
                subtitles["script"] = artifact_id
                texts["script"] = artifact_id
            elif role == "clip_text" and artifact_id:
                texts["clip_text"] = artifact_id
            elif role == "forum_post_info" and artifact_id:
                context["forum_post_info"] = artifact_id
            elif role == "cover_image" and artifact_id and "image" not in cover:
                cover["image"] = artifact_id
            elif role == "cover_manifest" and artifact_id:
                cover["manifest"] = artifact_id
            elif role == "processing_log" and artifact_id and "processing" not in logs:
                logs["processing"] = artifact_id
            elif role == "pipeline_state" and artifact_id:
                pipeline_state = {
                    "artifact_id": artifact_id,
                    "path": path_text,
                }
                pipeline_state.update(self._read_pipeline_state_summary(path_text))

        manifest: Dict[str, Any] = {
            "schema_version": RESULT_SCHEMA_VERSION,
            "task_id": task.task_id,
            "artifact_count": len(artifacts),
            "primary_artifact_id": primary_artifact_id,
            "primary_output_path": str(result.get("output_path") or "").strip(),
            "videos": videos,
            "subtitles": subtitles,
            "cover": cover,
        }
        if texts:
            manifest["texts"] = texts
        if context:
            manifest["context"] = context
        if logs:
            manifest["logs"] = logs
        if pipeline_state:
            manifest["pipeline_state"] = pipeline_state
        return manifest

    def _safe_resolve_existing_path(self, value: str) -> Optional[Path]:
        text = str(value or "").strip()
        if not text:
            return None
        candidate = Path(text)
        if not candidate.exists() or not candidate.is_file():
            return None
        try:
            return candidate.resolve()
        except Exception:
            return candidate

    def _safe_resolve_existing_dir(self, value: str) -> Optional[Path]:
        text = str(value or "").strip()
        if not text:
            return None
        candidate = Path(text)
        if not candidate.exists() or not candidate.is_dir():
            return None
        try:
            return candidate.resolve()
        except Exception:
            return candidate

    def _should_expose_video_artifact(self, path: Path) -> bool:
        suffix = path.suffix.lower()
        name = path.name.lower()
        video_exts = {".mp4", ".mov", ".mkv", ".avi", ".m4v", ".webm"}
        image_exts = {".png", ".jpg", ".jpeg", ".webp"}
        if suffix in video_exts or suffix in image_exts:
            return True
        if name in {"total.srt", "total.ass", "script.txt", "state.json"}:
            return True
        if name in {"clip_text.txt", "forum_post_info.json"}:
            return True
        if suffix == ".json" and "cover_manifest" in name:
            return True
        if suffix == ".log":
            return True
        return False

    def _classify_video_artifact_role(self, path: Path, primary_resolved: Optional[Path]) -> Tuple[str, str]:
        text = path.name.lower()
        suffix = path.suffix.lower()
        if primary_resolved is not None and path == primary_resolved:
            return "final_video", "video"
        if text == "total.srt":
            return "subtitle_srt", "subtitle"
        if text == "total.ass":
            return "subtitle_ass", "subtitle"
        if text == "script.txt":
            return "transcript_text", "transcript"
        if text == "clip_text.txt":
            return "clip_text", "text"
        if text == "forum_post_info.json":
            return "forum_post_info", "context"
        if text == "state.json":
            return "pipeline_state", "manifest"
        if suffix == ".json" and "cover_manifest" in text:
            return "cover_manifest", "manifest"
        if suffix == ".log":
            return "processing_log", "log"
        if suffix in {".png", ".jpg", ".jpeg", ".webp"}:
            return "cover_image", "image"
        if "无封面文字可自由添加" in path.name:
            return "coverless_video", "video"
        if "无字幕版" in path.name:
            return "video_no_subtitle", "video"
        if "带字幕版" in path.name:
            return "video_subtitled", "video"
        return "video", "video"

    def _video_artifact_sort_key(self, path: Path, primary_resolved: Optional[Path]) -> Tuple[int, str]:
        role, _ = self._classify_video_artifact_role(path=path, primary_resolved=primary_resolved)
        order = {
            "final_video": 0,
            "video_subtitled": 1,
            "video_no_subtitle": 2,
            "coverless_video": 3,
            "subtitle_srt": 4,
            "subtitle_ass": 5,
            "transcript_text": 6,
            "clip_text": 7,
            "forum_post_info": 8,
            "cover_image": 9,
            "cover_manifest": 10,
            "processing_log": 11,
            "pipeline_state": 12,
            "video": 13,
        }
        return (order.get(role, 99), str(path).lower())

    def _build_video_artifact_id(self, role: str, index: int, used_ids: set[str]) -> str:
        base = re.sub(r"[^a-z0-9]+", "_", str(role or "artifact").lower()).strip("_") or "artifact"
        candidate = base
        if candidate in used_ids:
            candidate = f"{base}_{index}"
        used_ids.add(candidate)
        return candidate

    def _build_artifact_relative_path(self, path: Path, task_dir: Optional[Path]) -> str:
        if task_dir is None:
            return path.name
        try:
            return str(path.relative_to(task_dir))
        except Exception:
            return path.name

    def _read_pipeline_state_summary(self, state_path: str) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        path = self._safe_resolve_existing_path(state_path)
        if path is None:
            return {}
        try:
            payload = json.loads(path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
        except Exception:
            return {}
        if not isinstance(payload, dict):
            return {}
        summary: Dict[str, Any] = {}
        if "last_completed_step" in payload:
            try:
                summary["last_completed_step"] = int(payload.get("last_completed_step"))
            except Exception:
                pass
        step_name = str(payload.get("last_completed_step_name") or payload.get("step_name") or "").strip()
        if step_name:
            summary["last_completed_step_name"] = step_name
        output_file = str(payload.get("output_file") or "").strip()
        if output_file:
            summary["output_file"] = output_file
        return summary

    def _is_final_output_already_equivalent(self, output_path: str, original_filename: str) -> bool:
        output_file = Path(str(output_path or "").strip())
        output_name = output_file.name
        if not output_name:
            return False
        parsed = Path(self._sanitize_filename(original_filename))
        stem = parsed.stem if parsed.suffix else parsed.name
        if not stem:
            return False
        suffix = parsed.suffix or output_file.suffix or ".mp4"
        expected = f"{stem}_final{suffix}"
        return output_name.lower() == expected.lower()

    def _resolve_named_output_path(self, output_path: str, original_filename: str) -> str:
        source = Path(str(output_path).strip())
        if not source.exists():
            return str(source)

        sanitized = self._sanitize_filename(original_filename)
        if not sanitized:
            return str(source)
        parsed = Path(sanitized)
        stem = parsed.stem if parsed.suffix else parsed.name
        if not stem:
            return str(source)
        suffix = parsed.suffix or source.suffix or ".mp4"
        candidate = source.with_name(f"{stem}{suffix}")
        if candidate.resolve() == source.resolve():
            return str(source)

        selected = candidate
        index = 1
        while selected.exists():
            selected = source.with_name(f"{stem}_{index}{suffix}")
            index += 1

        shutil.copy2(source, selected)
        return str(selected)

    def _resolve_download_filename(self, task: UnifiedTask, source_url: str) -> str:
        guessed = self._guess_download_filename(source_url)
        original_filename = self._resolve_original_filename(
            forum_post_info=(task.metadata or {}).get("forum_post_info"),
            payload=task.payload,
            metadata=task.metadata,
            source_url=source_url,
        )
        if not original_filename:
            return guessed

        parsed_original = Path(original_filename)
        stem = self._sanitize_filename(parsed_original.stem if parsed_original.suffix else parsed_original.name)
        if not stem:
            return guessed
        suffix = parsed_original.suffix or Path(guessed).suffix or ".mp4"
        return f"{stem}{suffix}"

    def _resolve_video_source_url(
        self,
        task_type: TaskType,

from __future__ import annotations

import json
import shutil
from pathlib import Path
from typing import Optional
from typing import Any

from .base import StageResult
from .utils import ensure_stage_dir, stage_artifact_path


def run_stage9_organize(
    input_video: str,
    *,
    output_dir: str,
    task_id: str,
    keep_intermediate_files: bool,
    forum_post_info: Optional[dict] = None,
    original_filename: str = "",
) -> StageResult:
    source = Path(input_video)
    stage_dir = ensure_stage_dir(output_dir, task_id)
    if not source.exists():
        return StageResult(success=False, output_file=input_video, error_message="stage9 input missing")

    info = forum_post_info or {}
    candidate_name = str(original_filename or info.get("original_filename", "")).strip()
    preferred_stem = Path(candidate_name).stem.strip() if candidate_name else ""
    final_dir_name = preferred_stem or task_id

    task_root = Path(output_dir) / final_dir_name
    task_root.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    final_output = task_root / f"{final_dir_name}_final.mp4"
    legacy_output = task_root / f"{task_id}.mp4"

    if source.resolve() != final_output.resolve():
        shutil.copyfile(source, final_output)
    if source.resolve() != legacy_output.resolve():
        shutil.copyfile(source, legacy_output)

    archive_dir = task_root / f"{task_id}_artifacts"
    logs_dir = task_root / "logs"
    archive_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    logs_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    if keep_intermediate_files:
        if stage_dir.exists():
            archive_stages = archive_dir / "_stages"
            logs_stages = logs_dir / "_stages"
            if archive_stages.exists():
                shutil.rmtree(archive_stages)
            if logs_stages.exists():
                shutil.rmtree(logs_stages)
            shutil.copytree(stage_dir, archive_stages, dirs_exist_ok=True)
            shutil.copytree(stage_dir, logs_stages, dirs_exist_ok=True)

    manifest_path = stage_artifact_path(output_dir, task_id, "stage9_organize_manifest", ".json")
    payload = {
        "task_id": task_id,
        "final_output": str(final_output),
        "legacy_output": str(legacy_output),
        "keep_intermediate_files": bool(keep_intermediate_files),
        "original_filename": str(original_filename or ""),
        "forum_post_info": forum_post_info or {},
        "archive_dir": str(archive_dir),
        "final_output_dir": str(task_root),
    }
    manifest_path.write_text(json.dumps(payload, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding="utf-8")
    return StageResult(success=True, output_file=str(final_output), artifacts={"manifest_file": str(manifest_path)})


def run(*args: Any, **kwargs: Any) -> StageResult:
    return run_stage9_organize(*args, **kwargs)
